description: The Siderno Group is a criminal association related to the 'Ndrangheta, based in Siderno, Calabria, Italy. It operates in Canada, Australia, the United States, and Europe, primarily involved in global cocaine trafficking and money laundering. The group was formed by migrants from Siderno who moved to Canada and Australia in the 1950s. It maintains close ties with the Commisso 'ndrina and other families.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Australian version of the Siderno Group was involved in drug and arms trafficking as well as money laundering.
country_links.context: The Siderno Group has an Australian version involved in drug and arms trafficking and money laundering.
